posts.title: sao luiz do maranhao
posts.author: Xingu, The River
posts.content: try again, third time - one more bad password - protect your information from being stolen - and we are dead - but for another season melting icecaps - the world disappears - in quicksand we lost you again untangle me gently - we can do better than that i'll deny it for sure - ever fare skipping in strattford - i muse amused by stars - and your nose is the last we see - before disappearing in quicksand you lost me again thought you were going - to the beach to sleep

posts.title: hyderabad
posts.author: Xingu, The River
posts.content:
(thursdays with pepper) let me suck the bird out of your shoulder - be my one and only + ask me anything tonight - we will end up singing - "shout through the heart" - at a karaoke on thursdays anyway
sing michael sing, and feign silver and give us delhi gold - with drag-queens and danceband has-beens - and the tobacco industry despairs
let me put your finger - through the spider web in my back - be my one and only tonight - my drag queen to eternity under a puff of smoke
we always planned to crowdsource - our escape from this world

posts.title: toronto
posts.author: Xingu, The River
posts.content: (big fish, small pond) it's sad, I never saw her face, and she never told me her name I remember her underwear or not wearing one and chain smoking under a broken lamppost I broke you I love piano music too "what I'd say" and downward dogs chakra, launderettes these kind of things take me on a trip a boat trip to vancouver we can eat sausages by the riverside we can grow old together by the riverside i never complained of you behaving like a tortoise a slug an armadillo all at once hidden deep inside your jeans

posts.title: ( pain island ) the first brick
posts.author: Xingu, The River
posts.content:
i have many problems.
but my biggest problem is that i lie.
mostly to myself.
i always tell you my problems.
unfortunately for you,
i have many problems.
fortunately for you,
i hide them behind stories.
so you don't have to worry.
i am scared. i need to jump.
jumping off is scary. 
and you may have to lay 
in cold water for a while.
i'm on another titanic
but i know how to swim now

posts.title: ( istambul ) plagiarize again, again
posts.author: Xingu, The River
posts.content:
no you are not my shrink
you are not my mother
and you are not my friend
   i never lost anything
i lost my breath
i lost my bearings
i lost the plot
but i came out on top
   i never lost anything
   that i wanted to keep 
i lost my heart
i lost my ring
so bury my heart
under the snow outside
beyond the line
that can't be uncrossed
   i never lost anything
   that i wanted to keep
   (i know that now) 
      - i am off to feed the hate wolf

posts.title: ( eindhoven ) fool's gold
posts.author: Xingu, The River
posts.content:
nobody upstream can
outsmart us
we were on top
for twenty odd seasons 
we were older then
for-years
no one's can, rusting away
at the lake shore
you were there
spinning tiny arms
playing dragonfly
with your silhouette
for-hours
silly hauteur pixie hair 
you were crop 
of the mainstream then
ready to change the world 
for-ever
( forever ended on a monday )

posts.title: ( kyoto ) park royal
posts.author: Xingu, The River
posts.content:
change
silently
nest
in loops
nested
in speeches
people lost
speechless
it issued
my passport
your media is write protected

fast
fatten
velocity
in disgust
i had guessed
that much
from looking
at birdmen
of prey
and feathers
i fear
no bird
your media is write protected

thieves
scheming
drinks
of spice
i play you play
you control
the knobs
and set the controls
for the heart of the scum
matter-of-factly
all is not
forgiven
your media is write protected

posts.title: ( newbury ) crash incident
posts.author: Xingu, The River
posts.content:
I was 40 mins early
my wife says I am always early
then i remarried a nun
reinhardt is innocent
a nun in disguise
better still
with butter
a shrink
he shrank heads
then gave head
a head start
always ahead

If I can play it right
then I secure myself a future
in the production line

nobody gets a gold medal
for being too good these days
you can keep the medal,
i'll keep the gold
as long as we can be
in the same crash
me, you, reinhardt
reinhardt is innocent
If he was a monk then
we could call him brother


If I can play it right
then I secure myself a future
in the production line

knock yourself out
from a helicopter
17:00 is coming at you
like a behemoth out of hell
you sit in the queue
and then you just see a car
fly into another one
and then coke cans
flames blood airbags
got it quite bad I heard this morning

around the corner
is just a place  I have seen car crashes
when I commuted into London in the nineties

If I can play it right
then I secure myself a future
in the production line

posts.title: ( walldorf ) voll vertrauen
posts.author: Xingu, The River
posts.content:
the chairman is bringing toys
to everyone on board
 ( plush toys don't buy me
I prefer latex dolls )

judas, name thy price
know what I mean big boy?

beware the ides of march
the march of the idle
and the full moon
beware the crows and cows
the children of the barn
the children of the maize

judas, name thy price
know what I mean big boy?

the scarecrow grins,
brutus himself even?
blessed be the cheese-makers
the latin preachers
the cheering ladrones
and the wall street pimps

judas, name thy price
know what I mean big boy?

posts.title: ( baku ) undivided
posts.author: Xingu, The River
posts.content:
you will give it to me - under hypnosis 
sure, i was hypnotized once (or twice)
but, in retrospect, i think i may have lied to the public
there was a message, a hidden message (there always is) maths
inbetween - me and you
that is probably better
you are half russian, and therefore better
a bribe; i will bring you gifts - gold, incense and pepper
and your son will do good in maths again

posts.title: ( cairns ) harvey
posts.author: Xingu, The River
posts.content:
you would never guess
the name mother gave me
it would have ruined me
if I told them to stay
at gunpoint
instead we went west
and returned different men
and women
you would never guess
how many scars we got
from that car crash in 74
damn us in eulogy
it's just as well
we couldn't get pistols then
we would have killed them all
we should have killed them all
you would never guess
I've heard another version
of the same story you see
the one that ends
with us fed to sharks
in a mexican slum
and you rubbing her feet
in Amsterdam

posts.title: ( arlington ) a promise
posts.author: Xingu, The River
posts.content:
it was good yesterday
and now we are here 
come on let us hear you confess
we know it was you
at the back of the bus
with the christian league
late last night 
outside the club 
operating your vehicle
with the headlights off
it must be it
a sweet thing
so loving it gets hurt
every tuesday
for an entire year
you fit the description
given soon thereafter
by some sleepy devil
it had to be you
it had to be you
and the devil
clears the stage and falls 
asleep  
and now we are here 
watching 
as it all goes to waste 
virginia i am leaving you
this time forever i promise

posts.title: ( algiers ) bumper to bumper
posts.author: Xingu, The River
posts.content:
drumming
skinned goats
skinny, hungry
lots of them, 
shot dead 
crossed rib cages
the woman
with the water jug
sighed 
carrying the water 
through touareg
every drop
priceless.... 

blink
ah there's a u-turn
two miles ahead
by chance
we just missed
key bridge...

the kick drum
hiccuped,
frowned.

I think of my enemies
in armoires 
armored cars
shelling my home
to rubble...

stop
the van just stopped
you missed it
we crashed
our friends party
by chance  
we just missed
the key bridge

posts.title: ( sausalito ) awakenings
posts.author: Xingu, The River
posts.content:
beware
of the bridge
if it opens 
we'll fall
no matter what
you need to teach
your children
to play in the dark

be where?
maybe not
i will be asleep
and fall
on my back
like samsa

no matter what
remember to teach
your children
to play in the dark

be aware
she'll come back
too late
that's all that mattered
then
now i'm not so sure

no matter what
we need to teach
our children
to play in the dark

posts.title: ( praha ) incoherence
posts.author: Xingu, The River
posts.content:
we, stranded 
on st moritz 
the luggage gone.
i woke up
there was 
a lot of snoring 
to the left of me.you have done it 
i needed to make it easy on you
to my head
in my head
i'll take my car 
and drive 
to your house 
today 
and force you to choose
i needed to make it easy on you
tomorrow 
will be better
a better day for cherries
either way
it is my way or coercion
and disrespect
i was born and raised
in a ghetto
non sanitized
no sanity
no saints
i needed to make it easy on you
i guess violence is then
destiny
inevitable
for the illiterate
the blessed
the blissed
the abyss is my salvation
right on right on
i think i am 
upside down

posts.title: ( kauai ) maria ignacio, cloned
posts.author: Xingu, The River
posts.content:
life repeats itself in a petri dish
i repent (it must be my fault)
life imitates itself
and suddenly i don't know where home is
[ your lottery number is currently on hold ]
life runs on disposable batteries
always one step ahead
life running out of batteries
out of air breathless, steps aside
[ your personal profile is currently on hold ]
i hated repeating myself
how thin my life spreads, with the sun
i never meant to change you (but you changed)
[ your personnel account is currently on hold ]
you want pretense? I will pretend
"it is all the same"
in corruption in sin alone
with nothing left, when nothing was right
i don't know what to do
[ your private life is currently on hold ]

posts.title: ( nunavut ) birdlike
posts.author: Xingu, The River
posts.content:
so this is the price
she needed to pay
fishing love for life
in the green river
it was a difficult walk
through clouds of flies
I never thought it were
handcuffs
she had in her purse
to protect me
from words unwritten
in a language that's not hers
the bridge's collapsing
with it she went
and with her the promise
to see me through
another year

posts.title: ( nichteroy ) crop circles
posts.author: Xingu, The River
posts.content:
dios mío
soledad
i think therefore i think
i am 
soledad
alone
in silence, thinking
a meme
machine
in solitude
i am a prisoner
of my genes
coded
in me
a meme
machine
running in circles
carved in clay
crash landing
on the beach
in solitude
an attitude
of respect
your faith in me
is all i have left
right?
your disbelief
is me, vanishing
the last light
gone
alone
with me

posts.title: ( thessaloniki ) pyramids
posts.author: Xingu, The River
posts.content:
clouded
upon reflection nowadays it looks like 
what we were buying was wrong
we needed forgiveness
not to go see the cardinals
and do as they ask
kneeling on a milk crate

turn the table bite the table, and a big table it is
for that we will be sorry one day soon
you laughed I wished good luck, like gods do
having a toast and a cup, as only gods do

rearranging the cherry tree
touting on seahorses
racing mongrels of brown fur
no one will have radio silence
tonight no one sleeps

turn the table bite the table, and a big table it is
for that we will be sorry one day soon
you laughed I wished good luck, like gods do
having a toast and a cup, as only gods do

posts.title: ( jerusalem ) heavenscent
posts.author: Xingu, The River
posts.content:
so everything is as usual:
I had a good laugh,
should not be long b4 he returns

under the floor
look for pipes under the floor
they are all leaking

no matter what you say about summer
it always end too soon
you need a wet suit

matthew has returned from sinai
amen hallelujah
we will now be guided
from bondage 
and slavery
and polar bears

god sent him 
that is beautiful 
beautiful 
sinners
stay away from my head
with your voices
i am sinning wholesale

posts.title: ( mozambique ) the struggle goes on
posts.author: Xingu, The River
posts.content:
the wall, sprayed in paint
art youthful, colorful
everything and snakeskin
widening to infinite
then it crashed in silence
come on let's follow it
and go inside
there is a banquet to celebrate
our land escaping with ladders
...
the walls prayed for paint
hands together tight
fingers to the sky we will pry
the gates that keep us here
crying alone
…
the policemen they just watched
unsurely considering shooting us
as policemen always do

posts.title: ( port-of-spain ) everything must go
posts.author: Xingu, The River
posts.content:
she took a job as a janitor
at the madhouse
painting, gardening
the odd-job to make summer last
but plumbing, oh no
that was more than she could handle
and because of that 
the whole place drowned
the coppers took her
and sent her to trinidad
where the riots were hitting the tv stores
like widlfire
i saw her on cctv footage
with a slogan t-shirt reading
"free my people from bondage"
on the front
and a portrait of alain prost
on the back
and because of that 
the whole place drowned

posts.title: ( helsinki ) before the shots
posts.author: Xingu, The River
posts.content:
tonight's the night
my husband comes home
i need a break
from rocking cradles
i have anvils around my neck
and in the small of my back
tingling then tangling
valueing my thoughts
in karats of gold
i see myself in your mirrors
we knew life would catch up
with our dreams and make
a mockery of our plans
a sign...
you thought it was a sign
of growing up wiser

posts.title: ( madrid ) covered in rust
posts.author: Xingu, The River
posts.content:
sold all my records
put up a stand on a sunday market
all vinyl's now gone
revealed naked and unashamed
the soundtrack of our youth
you and jack and me
I object the fact we will never meet jack
now jack has gone AWOL 
in plaza mayor
on a trip without drugs
everything's gone red
and nobody's doing anything 
after 3 am
we will wait all night
outside the barbershop
you and jack and me
it's been a while we know
with all these new things 
i have to do now
it's been a while we know
with all these new things 
i have to do now

posts.title: ( baghdad ) things you can say to a stranger
posts.author: Xingu, The River
posts.content:
do you remember dancing
spiraling with friends
to slow music six degrees
rustle, abbeys, i kneel i pray
touch my forehead to the ground
this land is my land
kiss the ground
like a pontiff
impure befouled nothing none
the masons marching on
unfold betaken
you fool! we had nowhere else to go
it is in our nature
to curse under candlelight
this land is my land
it is true, it happened in baghdad
i saw it on CNN last night

posts.title: ( beijing ) this'd better be good
posts.author: Xingu, The River
posts.content:
I woke up from this dream (my favorite dream)
I am a thief in an empty bar, it is 5 am (no surprise)
I wait (everybody does) I wait for a messiah
and it feels like cheating my girlfriend with her neighbor
I sired stella with her
bless the fish the rain bless lennon and oh no!
open the door it is raining outside
I'm outside your apartment downtown leaning on the door
I'm outside Union square
I can never dream when it rains
that's when she leaves the bar, presses the spacebar
pauses....life

posts.title: ( vatican city ) god choked on a stone
posts.author: Xingu, The River
posts.content:
they slaughtered the lamb
i was so disappointed...

I remembered once
the preacher explained
my whereabouts in Detroit
with dirty words like
"he is probably out there
looking for the beaver big"

god watched it all
from down below
without a sound

they slaughtered the lamb
i was paralyzed
from the neck down
from plunging into a shallow creek
i needed to get to the other side
and climb the tangerine trees
and i disappear
unnoticed
except by god
god watched it all
from down below
without a sound
